message:
test(core): add property-based tests for formal invariant checker (ft-2p9cb.5.1.3)

15 proptests: scheduler capacity/conservation/epoch invariant correctness,
budget percentile/nonneg/overflow invariant correctness, recovery cooldown/
escalation count invariant correctness, checker totals consistency, violation
rate bounds, reset clears, domain/severity/degradation serde. Total: 225.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
